data.title: Two-Step Verification
data.description: An added security layer requiring a PIN for account verification.
data.technical_spec: User-configured PIN to protect account from unauthorized access.

data.title: Spam Detection
data.description: Automatic detection and barring of spam and bulk messages.
data.technical_spec: Machine learning algorithms analyze message patterns.

data.title: Fraud Prevention
data.description: Mechanisms to prevent account takeovers and unauthorized access.
data.technical_spec: Combination of behavioral analytics and user reporting.

data.title: Encryption at Rest
data.description: Data is encrypted while on servers to prevent unauthorized access.
data.technical_spec: AES-256 encryption used for storing data.

data.title: Cross-Site Scripting Prevention
data.description: Prevention of XSS attacks by sanitizing inputs.
data.technical_spec: Input validation and content security policy enforcement.
